title: protect-lib for SV Pkg support
body:
I am playing with Ariane from https://github.com/pulp-platform/ariane

1. Verilator compiled and run nicely
2. To try protect-lib, I select a submodule "frontend". Compile done with no error.
3. Simple add "-protect-lib FE_secret":
      %Error: src/frontend/frontend.sv:31: Internal: Unknown node type reached emitter: REFDTYPE 'bp_resolve_t'
      input  bp_resolve_t        resolved_branch_i,
                  ^~~~~~~~~~~~
   The generated file Vfrontend.cpp, Vfrontend.h are exactly the same as generated in #2. 
   But the generated FE_secret.sv contains:
   
     input 
     ???? // DEFDTYPE 'bp_resolve_t'
       esovled_branch_i
   
    seems like struct bp_resolve_t is not recognized, or the definition could not be found.

bp_resolve_t is defined in package file "ariane_pkg.sv" as: 
    typedef struct packed {
        logic                   valid;           // prediction with all its values is valid
        logic [riscv::VLEN-1:0] pc;              // PC of predict or mis-predict
        logic [riscv::VLEN-1:0] target_address;  // target address at which to jump, or not
        logic                   is_mispredict;   // set if this was a mis-predict
        logic                   is_taken;        // branch is taken
        cf_t                    cf_type;         // Type of control flow change
    } bp_resolve_t;

Verilator Verison:
    Verilator 4.029 devel rev v4.028-4-g18f8cd05

Will try to create a smaller test case but I assume this might be something already know ?
